scenario: dotenv adapter placeNew(component, conceptId) → on-disk relative path, per emitted type. Mirrors placement/all-types.json's byType + env edge cases. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
realWorldSource: AKM-native; mirrors the frozen placement/all-types.json env + secret entries and edge cases (envDefaultAlias, envAlreadySuffixedNameIsIdempotent, secretNestedNameIsIdentityJoin)
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. Component-root-relative POSIX paths. env places to env/<name>.env; secret places to secrets/<name> (name kept as an identity join, no extension logic).
edgeCases pin the branches the frozen all-types placement golden documents: the bare `.env` default alias, the already-suffixed idempotent env name, and a nested secret name (identity join).

envDefaultAlias.name: default
envDefaultAlias.note: the bare `.env` file aliases to name 'default' (mirrors all-types 'envDefaultAlias').

envAlreadySuffixedNameIsIdempotent.note: a conceptId already ending in .env does not gain a second suffix (mirrors all-types 'envAlreadySuffixedNameIsIdempotent').

secretNestedNameIsIdentityJoin.note: nested secret names join as identity, no extension logic (mirrors all-types 'secretNestedNameIsIdentityJoin').
